shadow.field: Matches Encroachment Bot v2 started. Waiting for 500 tick sample.

block.field: Matches Encroachment Bot v2 started. Waiting for 500 tick sample.

shadow.field: WIN. Cycle closed and stake reset.

block.field: WIN. Cycle closed and stake reset.

shadow.field: LOSS. Recovery cap reached or martingale disabled; cycle reset.

block.field: LOSS. Recovery cap reached or martingale disabled; cycle reset.

shadow.field: Max daily loss reached. Bot stopped.

block.field: Max daily loss reached. Bot stopped.

shadow.field: ME v2 dual entry 1/2: matching second-highest digit.

block.field: ME v2 dual entry 1/2: matching second-highest digit.

shadow.field: ME v2 dual entry 2/2: matching least digit in approved probability band.

block.field: ME v2 dual entry 2/2: matching least digit in approved probability band.

shadow.field: ME v2 entry: matching second-highest digit only.

block.field: ME v2 entry: matching second-highest digit only.
